name: Chocolate Chocolate Chip Cake (Plain Jane)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Stir together the cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, oil, and water in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Add the chocolate chips at the last moment so they won't get too crushed.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
5. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for about 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioner's sugar before serving.
